title: Privacy Policy
s1_p1: Sílvia Seixas Pinho Peralta (Sweevil), NIF 247 911 780, Rua das Eirinhas, 157, Casa 6, 4300-166 Porto, Portugal.
s2_p1: We collect only the data strictly necessary for order processing and customer communication:
s2_li5: Payment data (processed by the payment provider; not stored by Sweevil)
s3_title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis for Processing
s3_p1: Data is processed for the following purposes:
s3_li1: Order processing and management (performance of a contract — Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
s3_li2: Order-related communication, such as confirmations and shipping updates (legitimate interest — Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
s3_li3: Compliance with legal obligations, such as invoicing (legal obligation — Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR)
s4_p1: Personal data may be shared with carriers (CTT, DPD, DHL, GLS) solely for delivery purposes, and with the payment processor (Stripe) for transaction processing. We do not share data with third parties for marketing or advertising purposes.
s5_p1: Data is retained for the minimum period required to fulfil legal obligations (in particular tax and accounting obligations), generally no longer than 10 years, in accordance with Portuguese tax legislation.
s6_p1: Under the GDPR, data subjects have the right to:
s6_li3: Request erasure of their data ("right to be forgotten")
s6_li6: Lodge a complaint with the CNPD (National Data Protection Commission) at
s6_p2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
s7_p1: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, loss, or destruction. Payment data is processed directly by payment providers in a secure environment and is not stored in our systems.
